integral x to the power of n space d x space equals space fraction numerator 1 over denominator n plus 1 end fraction space x to the power of n plus 1 end exponent space plus C
integral a x to the power of n plus k space d x space equals space a. fraction numerator 1 over denominator n plus 1 end fraction space x to the power of n plus 1 end exponent space plus space k x plus C space space space space space space space space space space space space space space space space space space space space space space space space space k equals k o n s t a t a left parenthesis a n g k a right parenthesis
